title: sudo proxy CP949 stdout fix: ElevatedEyeProxy StandardOutputEncoding=UTF8
desc: wkappbot-core --sudo output was CP949 mojibake. ElevatedEyeProxy now sets StandardOutputEncoding=UTF8 so Korean proxy output reads correctly.
steps: ElevatedEyeProxy.cs ExecuteCommand: psi.StandardOutputEncoding=Encoding.UTF8, psi.StandardErrorEncoding=Encoding.UTF8. Matches subprocess Console.OutputEncoding at startup. Deployed 2026-04-20 as FIX 2 in news-20260420-sudo-encoding.
Affects: wkappbot --sudo a11y read with Korean process names. Previously: ed 95 9c bytes read as CP949 = mojibake.
If stdout still garbled: check Console.OutputEncoding in Program.cs startup sets UTF8 before any output.
author: claude
